settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your AI agents, integrations, analysis preferences, and cycling biometrics.

aiAgents.title: AI Agents
aiAgents.subtitle: Customize your intelligence
aiAgents.description: Bring Your Own Key (BYOK). Enter your API keys to unlock advanced AI-powered training analysis.

intervals.title: Intervals.icu
intervals.subtitle: Sync workout data
intervals.description: Connect your Intervals.icu account to sync workout data and performance metrics automatically.

cycling.title: Cycling Settings
cycling.subtitle: Your profile data
cycling.description: Enter your cycling profile to enable accurate power-based training load calculations.

options.title: Options
options.subtitle: Analysis configuration
options.analyzeWithoutHRDescription: Enabling this will use Power (Watts) as the sole metric for training load calculations when HR data is missing.

availability.title: Availability
availability.description: Define every weekday explicitly so training plans and coach guidance respect your real week.
availability.unconfigured: Add at least one available day
availability.durationDisabled: Enable the day to choose a duration
availability.dayUnavailable: Blocked for recovery, life, or rest

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.connectionRequired: Connect Intervals.icu in Settings to view your calendar.
calendar.loadError: Unable to retrieve calendar data right now.
calendar.performanceInsightsPlaceholder: Performance insights cards will connect to PMC metrics in a later step.
calendar.upcomingTrainingData: Upcoming training data is being fetched.
calendar.scrollToRetry: Keep scrolling to retry loading this part of the calendar.
calendar.syncFailedMessage: Unable to sync this planned workout to Intervals right now.
calendar.importedWorkoutDetailsUnavailable: Intervals.icu did not expose detailed data for this imported workout.

report.title: Training Stress and Recovery
report.subtitle: Snapshot-driven readiness and load analysis for the signed-in athlete
report.description: Daily CTL, ATL, TSB, FTP, and rolling efficiency metrics rendered from persisted training-load snapshots.

empty.title: Training load will appear here
empty.description: Once completed workouts and daily snapshots are available, this dashboard will show CTL, ATL, TSB and the trend of your recent load.

aria.description: Fitness and fatigue chart from {{start}} to {{end}}. Latest load snapshot {{latestSnapshot}}. The highlighted dot follows {{series}} because that is the latest available load series point.
Form chart with freshness, optimal training, and high risk zones from {{start}} to {{end}}. Latest TSB snapshot {{latestSnapshot}}.

formBreakdown.title: Understanding Form (TSB)
formBreakdown.description: Training Stress Balance is the relationship between <fitness>Fitness (CTL)</fitness> and <fatigue>Fatigue (ATL)</fatigue>. It helps frame whether you are carrying useful training load, approaching peak freshness, or drifting into excessive risk.

freshnessPeak.title: Freshness / Peak
freshnessPeak.detail: Positive TSB. Fatigue has dropped while fitness is still present, so readiness is improving.

optimalTraining.title: Optimal Training
optimalTraining.detail: TSB sits in the productive band where adaptation is possible without excessive cost.

highRisk.title: High Risk
highRisk.detail: TSB is too negative. Load may be outpacing recovery, which raises overreaching risk.

details.insufficientHistory: Not enough history yet to compare the current load trend with the last two weeks.
details.trend: CTL changed by {{delta}} over the last 14 days while TSB sits at {{tsb}}. Keep translating this load into adaptation without reintroducing unnecessary fatigue.

races.title: Road Races
races.description: Track upcoming targets, keep finished race context visible, and place the key events alongside your training calendar.
races.loadError: Unable to load races right now: {{message}}
races.formDescription: Keep the race list clean and lightweight: name, date, distance, discipline, and priority are enough for the current calendar view.

coach.loadingError: Unable to load workouts right now.
coach.noWorkouts: No workouts found for this week.
coach.rpeDescription: Set the session effort before you save or start chatting with your coach.
coach.chatReady: Chat opens when you send the first message.
coach.chatRequiresAvailability: Set weekly availability before coach chat unlocks.
coach.chatAvailabilityRequiredBanner: AI Coach stays locked until you configure your weekly availability in Settings.
coach.chatRequiresRpe: Choose an RPE first to unlock coaching.
coach.chatSavedLocked: Summary saved. Click Edit to continue coaching.
coach.chatSavingSummaryHint: Generating the recap and checking whether planned workouts need an update. Keep this page open.
coach.selectWorkoutPrompt: Select a workout from the left panel to begin your coach conversation.
coach.emptyStateBody: Choose one of your recent workouts to rate the effort, review the session, and chat with your coach.
coach.confirmWithoutChatBody: This workout does not have a coach conversation yet. Are you sure you want to save the summary without chatting first?
